body.title: Nightly classifier pass over chat transcripts
body.result: ChatClassifier integrated into nightly pipeline: reads .jsonl transcripts, classifies via PurposeClassifier, deposits nodes to palace
body.intention: I intend that the existing LLM/KNN classifiers run nightly over CC chat transcripts, depositing classified nodes into the memory graph to feed the training pipeline.
body.description:
Classifiers exist (devices/scraps/purpose_classifier.py, lab/competition/classifiers/llm_classifier.py + knn_classifier.py) and Nanny runs cron_learning_pipeline.py at 03:30. Missing: a step that reads raw CC chat transcripts (.jsonl session files), extracts turn content, runs the classifier, and deposits memory nodes. This closes the observe→learn→improve loop for chat-derived training data.

**Affected files:** devices/scraps/purpose_classifier.py or new devices/scraps/chat_classifier.py, Nanny nightly schedule, cron_learning_pipeline.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every interface crossing; Postgres for state
**Scope boundary:** In scope: classifier pass over .jsonl transcripts + node deposit. Out of scope: classifier model training, competition harness changes, cloud classifiers.
**Completion criteria:** T-nightly-chat-classifier is CLOSED; Nanny schedule includes chat_classifier step; morning after deploy, palace contains nodes deposited from prior night's transcripts; log shows classifier run.
